content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 26, 2001

James B. French, Supt. of Schools
Trinity County Office of Education
Post Office Box 1256
Weaverville, CA 96093-1256

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. W-01-033

Dear Superintendent French:

This correspondence concerns your request for written advice on behalf of Board Member Debra Lono, which was in the final stages of preparation for submission to you. Per your March 27, 2001 phone call, the request for written advice is withdrawn, and the advice letter will not be issued.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Melissa Mikesell
Legal Intern
